title: Pinalia brachystachya
taxonomy: Pinalia brachystachya is classified under the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. This classification is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic relationships with other orchid species. Within the Orchidaceae family, Pinalia brachystachya belongs to the genus Pinalia, which comprises several species of orchids. The genus Pinalia is further divided into several subgenera, with Pinalia brachystachya belonging to the subgenus Pinalia. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary history and relationships of Pinalia brachystachya with other orchid species.
